subject: Please Submit Q1 Market Research Report
body:
Market team, please submit the Q1 market research report by this Friday. Focus on the following areas:
1. Impact of AI technology on our target industries (manufacturing/healthcare/education)
2. Latest market dynamics and policy changes in each target industry
3. Combined with our customer data, provide strategic recommendations for the next phase

The report needs to be sent to all management (CEO/CTO/CMO/VP Sales), please prepare an email draft.

Director Zhang

subject: Report Supplement: Manufacturing Customer AI Demand
body:
Adding some reference information for the market report:

During recent visits to manufacturing customers, multiple clients proactively asked about our AI feature roadmap, especially regarding AI quality inspection and predictive maintenance. Dingsheng Machinery's (VIP customer) CTO is even evaluating Competitor A's AI module.

I suggest the market report focus on AI's impact on manufacturing customers and whether our AI capability development schedule can meet customer needs. This directly affects second-half renewals.

Director Zhao
